# shouldColorMatch()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether the image should be color matched.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func shouldColorMatch() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if the image is a mask or gradient; otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], which is the default.

## Providing Information About the Image

- **imageBounds()**: Returns the bounds of the image expressed in pixels and aligned to integer boundaries.
- **imageColorSpace()**: Returns the color space of the image or `NULL` if the image should not be color matched.
